segments.title: Radix useId Wrapper Implementation Status
segments.summary: Deterministic `useId` wrapper successfully implemented and working to resolve hydration mismatches. The wrapper stops mismatch issues on Popover, Dialog, and Tooltip components. While not aesthetically pleasing, the solution provides stability and will be kept in a small utility for easy removal later when migrating to React 19.
actions: Justin: Keep wrapper in small utility
decisions: Ship the ugly fix for stability
Keep wrapper in utility for easy removal

segments.title: Machinen Transcript Segmentation Issue
segments.summary: Machinen experienced a transcript segmentation failure where diarization did not activate properly. Potential causes include KV lag, webhook retry ordering issues, or session boundary detection problems. A fallback mechanism exists to merge segments arriving within five minutes, and additional logging will be added around the lane join step.
actions: Justin: Add logging around lane join step
Justin: Check segmentation pipeline after lunch
decisions: Add logging for KV lag detection
Cache in memory before commit if KV is laggy

segments.title: Reproduction Steps Documentation
segments.summary: Documentation of reproduction steps for the Radix hydration issue: reload twice, open Dialog, observe mismatch warning. Console output will be captured and pasted into the worklog for reference.
